name: zarchive_list_link_node_between
description: zArchiveList::LinkNodeBetween links a new circular-list node between the previous and next nodes.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for @zArchiveList_LinkNodeBetween@12 at 0x48c9a0 passed with zero unmasked mismatches; Binary Ninja body is 19 bytes and the VC object symbol is 32 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smoke exercises the helper through push-front, push-back, remove, and pop behavior on circular archive lists.
